critical_issues.description: Module-level DefaultAzureCredential() instantiated at import time freezes the credential chain. Also creates test isolation leak since return inside with block exits the patch context before test body runs.
critical_issues.recommendation: Keep module-level credential per spec (issue explicitly says 'reuse at module level'), but fix test fixture to use yield instead of return so the patch stays active during test execution.

critical_issues.description: if_none_match='*' kwarg alongside overwrite=False bypasses the SDK's auto-inject path (_any_conditions returns True when explicit kwarg present), creating subtle coupling risk during future refactors.
critical_issues.recommendation: Keep explicit if_none_match='*' (required by spec) but add clarifying comment explaining the interaction with overwrite=False.

major_issues.description: write_failed() has no exception handling. If upload_blob raises (e.g. 503, network timeout), the exception propagates raw with no structured log entry.
major_issues.recommendation: Wrap in try/except with structured logging and re-raise.

major_issues.description: No tests for transient storage errors (HttpResponseError, ServiceRequestError) from write() or write_failed().
major_issues.recommendation: Add test verifying HttpResponseError propagates from write().

suggestions.description: writer fixture uses return inside with block, causing patch to exit before test body runs. Tests pass only because BlobClient is mocked separately in each test.
suggestions.recommendation: Change return to yield so patch stays active throughout test.

suggestions.description: No test for empty/whitespace run_date_utc - would create blob named '.json'.
suggestions.recommendation: Add input validation or document current permissive behavior as intentional.
